title: Iterative select_with_fee convergence is correct; 2-pass is not
description: select_with_fee uses an iterative loop. A contributor might suggest '2 passes is simpler and enough'. That is wrong: selecting more notes to cover a higher fee can trigger another fee increase, which 2 passes cannot handle. The iterative approach solves the correct fixed-point problem. Convergence is guaranteed because zip317_fee is monotone-nondecreasing in note count, the note set is finite, and each iteration either terminates or strictly increases the fee (a bounded increasing sequence must converge).
close_reason: Decision already documented in code. No code change needed.
